name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple Colorado locations. Same-day or next-day funding available.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company that operates a network of physical store locations, including presence in Colorado. The company has been serving consumers seeking quick access to cash and financial services for emergency needs. Based on their website navigation and service offerings, ACE has built a multi-service model beyond simple payday lending.

ACE Cash Express provides a range of financial products including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, and tax services. They advertise online loan options and maintain both general customer service and specialized internet operations teams. The company operates physical store locations where customers can access services in person, with a store locator tool available on their website. They also offer business services, suggesting a broader market reach than just consumer lending.

ACE distinguishes itself through its omnichannel approach, combining physical store locations with online lending options. The company appears to have regional operations (with Hurricane Ida store closures mentioned for New Orleans locations) and maintains compliance infrastructure for state-specific regulations, as evidenced by California Notice at Collection disclosures. Their customer service includes dedicated phone lines and email support for both general inquiries and internet-based loan operations.

However, the website testing revealed that specific location pages return 404 errors, suggesting potential issues with their web infrastructure or incomplete digital implementation. While they advertise multiple service categories, the actual availability of services appears state-dependent, with messages indicating "this type of loan is not available in this state." Consumers should verify service availability in their specific location before applying, as the online presence does not clearly delineate which products are available in which states.
address: 1105 Pat Booker Rd, Universal City, TX 78148

company_info.headquarters: 1105 Pat Booker Rd, Universal City, TX 78148

pros: Multiple service types available: installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services
Online loan options in addition to in-store services for added convenience
Same-day or next-day funding advertised for emergency cash needs
Established multi-location network with physical store presence for face-to-face service
Dedicated customer service teams with separate phone lines for online and general inquiries
State-specific compliance measures including California Notice at Collection disclosures
Business services offered in addition to consumer products
cons: Website infrastructure issues with multiple 404 errors on location-specific pages, limiting ability to verify services
Service availability is state-dependent with unclear transparency about which products work in which locations
Limited publicly available information about rates, terms, and APRs on the accessible website pages
Physical store network may not be comprehensive nationwide, limiting accessibility for many consumers
Recent store closures (Hurricane Ida reference) suggest potential operational disruptions
best_for: Consumers in Colorado seeking same-day or next-day emergency cash with title or collateral-based options
People needing check cashing, money transfers, or bill payment services at physical locations
Individuals requiring tax preparation services bundled with emergency lending options
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in states where their services are available who need quick emergency cash, title-based loans, or check cashing services and prefer in-person transactions or online access. Primary caveat: significant website functionality issues and unclear state-by-state service availability mean consumers must call or visit in person to verify if specific products are offered in their location.
services: Credit cards or stored value products (referenced as 'Cards')

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
